text: What's up, everyone?
I'm Marlene Alvarez, with Freeform.
I'm so lucky to be here at the world premiere of  Disney's new film, The Nutcracker and the Four Realms.
I'm a little blown away,
and I'm trying to keep my nerves down a little bit.
It's beginning to feel a lot like Christmas.
I love Christmas.
What's Christmas?
I'm so ready to see the film.
My stomach is just, like, butterflies.
It's one of those movies that you look forward to
seeing how it all comes together.
The future of the Realms lies with you.
This film is visually stunning.
I'm excited to see a modern telling
of such a classic story.
I'm going to fix it. Will you help me?
I think it's so spectacular
to bring a black ballerina into this film.
Young people will look and think, that's what a ballerina looks like.
It's really wonderful to be able to play a character
who finds herself in this world, and is ready to take it on.
You can do it all, and you can do it in heels.
It's time to save the kingdom.
